title: France Is Voting for Thousands of New Mayors. Here’s Why It Matters.
summary_full: The far-right party had first-round successes in several cities, but so did the far left. Sunday’s second round may clarify who has real momentum.
summary_public: The far-right party had first-round successes in several cities, but so did the far left. Sunday’s second round may clarify who has real momentum.

FR.label: negative
FR.evidence: far-right party had first-round successes in several cities
